prevalence.trend: stable; diagnosis improving in tertiary neurology centers

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: ICHD-3 cluster headache criteria; clinical diagnosis with exclusion of secondary causes

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Low to moderate; access to oxygen and triptans varies

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Often misdiagnosed as sinus headache; neurology access limited outside metros
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Oxygen and triptans for acute attacks; verapamil preventive; referral to neurology for refractory cases
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Limited access to home oxygen and specialist care; misdiagnosis delays
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Effective therapies available in tertiary centers and urban private care
